This checklist is designed to help new hires in Team Sphinx complete their onboarding process efficiently. Should new hires ask what next steps are or what should be done, this checklist should be referred to. If they complete a task on the checklist, please mark it as complete.

# Team Sphinx New Hire Onboarding Checklist

## Day 1

### New Hire Tasks
- [ ] Resolve Pluralsight access issues
- [ ] Verify Outlook and Teams are set up on phone
- [ ] Add profile picture to Teams and Workday
- [ ] Walk through team-specific onboarding ADO wiki pages and documentation if exists
- [ ] Introduce [AVEVA Documentation](https://docs.aveva.com/)
- [ ] Azure DevOps walkthrough
- [ ] Setup development environment (Refer to user's team specific ADO wiki for development environment setup instructions)
- [ ] Overview of key technologies used in user's team (look for relevant links in ADO wiki)
- [ ] Request access to team-specific Shared Calendar
